description: Seed context sources for E2E proof-of-life. Provides realistic NPA domain data so the 7-stage pipeline produces meaningful output even without live KB access.

npa_seed_sources.content: NPA Project NPA-001: Digital Asset Custody Platform. Status: draft_builder. Product type: NTG (New-to-Group). Jurisdiction: SG. Notional: SGD 50M. Initiated: 2026-01-15. Sponsor: Treasury & Markets. Risk tier: HIGH. Requires Full Track approval with 7-domain risk assessment.

GFM SOP Section 4.2 — NPA Classification & Approval Tracks: All New-to-Group (NTG) products require Full Track approval with mandatory 7-domain risk assessment. Sign-off required from: Risk Management Group (RMG), Legal & Compliance (LCS), Finance, Business (BIZ), and Technology & Operations (TECH_OPS). Variation products follow Expedited Track with 3-domain assessment. Classification decision must be documented with rationale.

MAS Notice 758 — Technology Risk Management, Section 11.2: Financial institutions offering digital asset custody services must conduct thorough technology risk assessments covering key management systems, cold/hot wallet architecture, smart contract risks, and operational resilience. Independent validation required before launch. Quarterly reporting to MAS on custody volumes and incident metrics.
